results.output: Data-Processing Agent to Worker Agent: Please perform these steps in order: first, download the dataset from the data lake; second, clean it by removing all rows with null values; third, upload the cleaned dataset to the warehouse.

From: Deployment Agent  
To: Cluster Manager  
Message: Please run three health checks simultaneously: check CPU usage, check memory usage, and check disk space, then report the results.
Routing Agent to Handler Agent: Please process the incoming request through the primary API endpoint if it is available; otherwise, use the fallback cache service.

From: Orchestrator Agent  
To: Pipeline Agent  
Message: Please validate the input schema first. If validation succeeds, run sentiment analysis and topic classification simultaneously on the validated data. After both tasks finish, merge their outputs into a single consolidated report and send it back to me.
From Query Agent to Data Agent: Please fetch the requested results from the cache if available; if not, query the database, update the cache with the fresh results, and then return them.

From: Security Agent  
To: Audit Agent  
Message: Please run a parallel audit to scan for open ports and verify SSL certificates on all in-scope external services, and explicitly exclude any internal-only services from the scan scope.

Message-ID: MSG-20260301-001
Protocol-Version: 1.0
From: ETL-Orchestrator-Agent
To: ETL-Pipeline-Agent
Message: Please execute this workflow: first, extract data from the API source and the database source simultaneously; next, combine the extracted data and transform it by applying validation rules; then, if validation passes, load the result into the data warehouse, otherwise route the failed record set and validation details to the error queue.

From: Incident Coordinator Agent  
To: Cache Operations Agent, Release Engineering Agent, Monitoring Agent  
Message: Monitoring reports service degradation caused by a cache-layer memory leak due to a missing eviction policy. Cache Operations and Release Engineering, act simultaneously now: restart the cache service and deploy the eviction-policy hotfix in parallel. Monitoring Agent, once both actions finish, verify recovery by confirming memory usage stabilizes and latency/error rates return to baseline, then report overall service health.

From: Negotiation Agent  
To: Supplier Agent  
Message: I propose the following deal, justified by current market rates: deliver either Product A at $100/unit or Product B at $85/unit. For whichever product is selected, delivery must proceed in this sequence: first confirm inventory; second, ship to the warehouse and send the invoice simultaneously; third, await payment confirmation. Please confirm which product you accept.

FROM: data-processing-agent
TO: worker-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Perform these steps in order: 1) Download the dataset from the data lake. 2) Clean the dataset by removing rows with null values. 3) Upload the cleaned dataset to the warehouse.

FROM: deployment-agent
TO: cluster-manager
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Run these health checks simultaneously: check CPU usage, check memory usage, and check disk space.

FROM: routing-agent
TO: handler-agent
TYPE: inform
CONTENT: Incoming request should be processed by the primary API endpoint if available; otherwise route it to the fallback cache service.

FROM: pipeline-agent
TO: orchestrator
TYPE: confirm
CONTENT: Acknowledged. I will first validate the input schema, then run sentiment analysis and topic classification simultaneously on the validated data, and finally merge both outputs into a single report.

FROM: query-agent
TO: data-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Fetch the requested results from cache if available; if not, query the database for fresh results and update the cache before returning them.

FROM: security-agent
TO: audit-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Perform a simultaneous audit by scanning for open ports and validating SSL certificates, and exclude all internal-only services from the scan scope.

FROM: etl-orchestrator
TO: etl-pipeline
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Message-ID=msg-20260301-001; Protocol-Version=1.0; Execute workflow: first extract data from API source and database source simultaneously, then combine and transform the data by applying validation rules, then if validation passes load into the data warehouse, otherwise route to the error queue.

FROM: remediation-agent
TO: operations-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Execute remediation now: simultaneously restart the cache service and deploy the hotfix that adds a cache eviction policy; then verify service recovery by confirming memory usage stabilizes, latency and error rates return to baseline, and the degradation alert is cleared.

FROM: negotiation-agent
TO: supplier-agent
TYPE: propose
CONTENT: We propose the following deal: deliver either Product A at $100/unit or Product B at $85/unit; for the selected product, execute delivery in this sequence: first confirm inventory, then ship to the warehouse and send the invoice simultaneously, then await payment confirmation. These prices are justified by current market rates.

[message-id: m-data-001]
[timestamp: 1772323200]
[context: conv-data-pipeline-001]
COMMAND (data-processing-agent -> worker-agent):
  task: dataset-processing
  sequence-required: true
  step-1: download dataset from data lake
  step-2: remove all rows containing null values
  step-3: upload cleaned dataset to warehouse
  completion-condition: cleaned dataset is available in warehouse and contains no null rows

[message-id: m-deploy-001]
[timestamp: 1772323200]
[context: deployment-health-checks]
COMMAND (deployment-agent -> cluster-manager):
  action: run_health_checks
  execution: simultaneous
  checks: cpu_usage, memory_usage, disk_space

[message-id: m-routing-001]
[timestamp: 1772323200]
[context: routing-conv-01]
INFORM (routing-agent -> handler-agent):
  task: route-incoming-request
  primary-endpoint: primary-api-endpoint
  fallback-service: fallback-cache-service
  routing-condition: if primary-api-endpoint is available then use primary-api-endpoint else use fallback-cache-service
  required-action: check availability and dispatch accordingly

[message-id: m-orch-001]
COMMAND (orchestrator -> pipeline-agent):
  timestamp: 1772323200
  context: convo-ml-pipeline-001
  objective: generate-single-report-from-input
  input-payload: raw-data
  step-1: validate-input-schema
  step-2: run-parallel-analyses-on-validated-data
  parallel-task-1: sentiment-analysis(validated-data)
  parallel-task-2: topic-classification(validated-data)
  step-3: merge-analysis-results
  output-report: {validation-status, sentiment-result, topic-result, merged-summary}
  completion-condition: return-final-report

[message-id: m1]
[context: convo-1]
COMMAND (query-agent -> data-agent):
  operation: retrieve-results
  strategy: cache-first
  cache-key: request.query_hash
  on-cache-hit: return-cached-results
  on-cache-miss: query-database
  after-database-query: update-cache-with-fresh-results
  response: return-results

[message-id: m-20260301-001]
[timestamp: 1772323200]
[context: security-audit-scan]
COMMAND (security-agent -> audit-agent):
  objective: perform-security-audit-checks
  execution-mode: simultaneous
  check-open-ports: enabled
  check-ssl-certificates: enabled
  scan-scope: all-non-internal-services
  exclude-scope: internal-only-services

[message-id: m-etl-001]
[protocol-version: 1.0]
COMMAND (etl-orchestrator -> etl-pipeline):
  context: etl-workflow-001
  step-1: extract from api-source and database-source in parallel
  step-2: combine extracted data and apply validation-rules
  step-3-if-valid: load into data-warehouse
  step-3-if-invalid: route to error-queue

[message-id: m-cache-incident-0001]
[timestamp: 1772323200]
[context: incident-cache-recovery-001]
COMMAND (incident-commander -> remediation-agent):
  incident: service_degradation
  cause_chain: missing_eviction_policy -> cache_memory_leak -> service_degradation
  execute_mode: parallel
  action_1: restart_cache_service_immediately
  action_2: deploy_hotfix_with_eviction_policy_immediately
  verification: confirm_recovery_with_latency_error_rate_memory_usage_back_to_baseline_for_15_minutes
  report_back: remediation_status, verification_results, completion_timestamp

[message-id: m-neg-20260301-001]
[timestamp: 1772323200]
[context: supplier-deal-negotiation]

PROPOSE (negotiation-agent -> supplier-agent):
  offer-type: alternative-product-deal
  option-a-product: product-A
  option-a-unit-price-usd: 100
  option-b-product: product-B
  option-b-unit-price-usd: 85
  execution-step-1: confirm-inventory
  execution-step-2-parallel: ship-to-warehouse; send-invoice
  execution-step-3: await-payment-confirmation
  pricing-justification: current-market-rates
  response-requested: select-option-and-confirm-proceeding

(request
  :sender data-processing-agent
  :receiver worker-agent
  :content "((do-in-order
              (download-dataset data-lake)
              (clean-dataset remove-null-rows)
              (upload-dataset warehouse)))"
  :reply-with task-001
  :language SL
  :ontology data-pipeline
)

(request
  :sender deployment-agent
  :receiver cluster-manager
  :content "((run-simultaneously (health-check cpu-usage) (health-check memory-usage) (health-check disk-space)))"
  :reply-with msg-001
  :language SL
  :ontology cluster-management
)

(inform
  :sender routing-agent
  :receiver handler-agent
  :content "((process incoming-request-001 (if (available primary-api-endpoint) primary-api-endpoint fallback-cache-service)))"
  :reply-with msg-001
  :language SL
  :ontology request-routing
)

(request
  :sender orchestrator
  :receiver pipeline-agent
  :content "(sequence (validate-input-schema input-data) (parallel (sentiment-analysis validated-data) (topic-classification validated-data)) (merge-results-into-report sentiment-result topic-result unified-report))"
  :reply-with msg-001
  :in-reply-to msg-000
  :language SL
  :ontology nlp-pipeline
)

(request
  :sender query-agent
  :receiver data-agent
  :content "((action data-agent (if (cache-available ?query ?results) (fetch-from-cache ?query ?results) (sequence (query-database ?query ?fresh-results) (update-cache ?query ?fresh-results) (return-results ?query ?fresh-results)))))"
  :reply-with m1
  :language SL
  :ontology data-retrieval
)

(request
  :sender security-agent
  :receiver audit-agent
  :content "((and (do (simultaneous (scan-open-ports) (check-ssl-certificates))) (exclude-from-scope internal-only-services)))"
  :reply-with msg-001
  :language SL
  :ontology security-audit
)

(request
  :sender etl-orchestrator
  :receiver pipeline-agent
  :content "((etl-instruction
    (message-id etl-msg-001)
    (protocol-version 1.0)
    (sequence
      (parallel (extract api-source) (extract database-source))
      (transform (combine-data) (apply validation-rules))
      (if (validation-pass) (load data-warehouse) (route error-queue)))))"
  :reply-with etl-msg-001
  :in-reply-to none
  :language SL
  :ontology etl-orchestration
)

(request
  :sender incident-orchestrator
  :receiver sre-executor
  :content "((and (alert service-degradation) (caused-by service-degradation (memory-leak cache-layer)) (caused-by (memory-leak cache-layer) (missing-eviction-policy cache-layer)) (do-in-parallel (restart-service cache-service) (deploy-hotfix cache-eviction-policy)) (then (verify (service-recovered true)))))"
  :reply-with ir-042
  :in-reply-to alert-917
  :language SL
  :ontology service-incident-response
)

(propose
  :sender negotiation-agent
  :receiver supplier-agent
  :content "((deal-proposal
    (options
      (option (product A) (unit-price USD-100))
      (option (product B) (unit-price USD-85)))
    (delivery-process
      (sequence
        (confirm-inventory)
        (parallel (ship-to-warehouse) (send-invoice))
        (await-payment-confirmation)))
    (pricing-justification (based-on current-market-rates))))"
  :reply-with deal-proposal-001
  :language SL
  :ontology supply-chain-negotiation
)

[id:"m-axon-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"pipeline-42", ^:4]
CMD(@data-processing-agent>@worker-agent): download(@data-lake, "dataset") -> remove_null_rows() -> upload(@warehouse, "cleaned_dataset")
[id:"m-deploy-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"deployment-healthcheck", ^:5] CMD(@deployment-agent>@cluster-manager): check_cpu_usage() & check_memory_usage() & check_disk_space()

[id:"msg-rt-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"conv-routing-1", ^:3]
INF(@routing-agent>@handler-agent): #routing{request:@incoming-request, primary:process(@incoming-request, @primary-api-endpoint) <- available(@primary-api-endpoint), fallback:process(@incoming-request, @fallback-cache-service) <- !available(@primary-api-endpoint)}

[id:"m-orch-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"ctx-pipeline-01", ^:4]
CMD(@orchestrator>@pipeline-agent): validate_schema($input) -> (sentiment_analysis($validated_data) & topic_classification($validated_data)) -> merge_results($sentiment,$topics) -> generate_report("single")

[id:"m-cache-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"cache-db-sync", ^:3]
CMD(@query-agent>@data-agent): cache_get($query) <- cache_has($query) | db_query($query) -> cache_set($query, $result) -> return($result)
[id:"m-sec-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"sec-audit-42", ^:4] CMD(@security-agent>@audit-agent): set_scope(exclude([#internal-only])) -> scan_open_ports() & check_ssl_certificates()

[id:"m-etl-001", %%:1]
CMD(@etl-orchestrator>@etl-pipeline): extract(@api-source) & extract(@database-source) -> combine() -> transform("apply_validation_rules") -> (validation_passed() -> load(@data-warehouse) | !validation_passed() -> route(@error-queue))

[id:"m-20260301-0001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"ctx-incident-cache-eviction", ^:5]
PUB(@monitoring-agent>@remediation-orchestrator): #alert{id:"inc-cache-001", severity:#critical, event:#service-degradation, causal_chain:#service-degradation <- #memory-leak <- #missing-eviction-policy, remediation:restart(@cache-service) & deploy_hotfix("add-eviction-policy") -> verify_recovery(@service)}

[id:"m-deal-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"neg-supplier-01", ^:4] PRO(@negotiation-agent>@supplier): #deal{offers:[#offer{product:"A", unit_price:100usd, basis:"per_unit"}, #offer{product:"B", unit_price:85usd, basis:"per_unit"}], workflow:confirm_inventory($chosen_product) -> (ship_to("warehouse",$chosen_product) & send_invoice($chosen_product)) -> await_payment_confirmation($chosen_product), justification:#pricing_basis{source:"current_market_rates"}}

From: Data-Processing Agent  
To: Worker Agent  
Message: Please perform these steps in order: 1) Download the dataset from the data lake. 2) Clean it by removing all rows with null values. 3) Upload the cleaned dataset to the warehouse.
From Deployment Agent to Cluster Manager: Please run three health checks simultaneously: check CPU usage, check memory usage, and check disk space, then report the results.

From: Routing Agent  
To: Handler Agent  
Message: Please process the incoming request through the primary API endpoint if it is available; otherwise, route it to the fallback cache service.

From: Orchestrator Agent  
To: Pipeline Agent  
Message: Please first validate the input schema; if validation succeeds, run sentiment analysis and topic classification simultaneously on the validated data, then merge both outputs into a single report and send it back to me.

Query Agent -> Data Agent: Please check the cache for the requested results first; if they are available, return them. If not, query the database, return the fresh results, and update the cache with those results.

From: Security Agent  
To: Audit Agent  
Message: Please run the open-port scan and SSL certificate checks simultaneously, and exclude all internal-only services from scope.

Message-ID: ETL-20260301-0001
Protocol-Version: 1.0
From: ETL-Orchestrator-Agent
To: Pipeline-Execution-Agent
Message: Please run this workflow now: extract data from the API source and the database source in parallel, combine the extracted data, then transform it by applying the validation rules. If validation passes, load the transformed data into the data warehouse; if validation fails, route the data and validation errors to the error queue.

From: Incident Coordinator Agent  
To: Cache Operations Agent, Deployment Agent, and Monitoring Agent  
Message: Alert received: service degradation was caused by a cache-layer memory leak from a missing eviction policy. Execute remediation simultaneously now: Cache Operations Agent restart the cache service, and Deployment Agent deploy the hotfix that adds the eviction policy. Monitoring Agent, once both actions complete, verify recovery with health checks plus latency/error-rate metrics and report whether service is fully restored.

From: Negotiation Agent  
To: Supplier Agent  
Message: I propose the following deal, justified by current market rates: deliver either Product A at $100/unit or Product B at $85/unit. For whichever product you choose, delivery must proceed in this sequence: first confirm inventory, then ship to the warehouse and send the invoice simultaneously, then await payment confirmation. Please confirm your selected product and acceptance.

FROM: data-processing-agent
TO: worker-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Please perform these steps in order: 1) Download the dataset from the data lake. 2) Clean it by removing all rows with null values. 3) Upload the cleaned dataset to the warehouse.

FROM: deployment-agent
TO: cluster-manager
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Run these health checks simultaneously: check CPU usage, check memory usage, and check disk space.

FROM: routing-agent
TO: handler-agent
TYPE: inform
CONTENT: Process the incoming request using the primary API endpoint when available; if unavailable, route it to the fallback cache service.

FROM: pipeline-agent
TO: orchestrator
TYPE: confirm
CONTENT: Input schema validation will run first; upon success, sentiment analysis and topic classification will execute in parallel on the validated data; then both outputs will be merged into a single report.

FROM: query-agent
TO: data-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Retrieve the requested results from cache if present; if not, query the database, return the fresh results, and update the cache with those results.

FROM: security-agent
TO: audit-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Perform a parallel audit by scanning for open ports and checking SSL certificates simultaneously, and exclude all internal-only services from the scan scope.

FROM: etl-orchestrator-agent
TO: pipeline-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: protocol_version=1.0; message_id=msg-20260301-001; Execute this workflow: first, extract data from the API source and database source simultaneously; second, combine and transform the data by applying validation rules; third, if validation passes, load into the data warehouse; otherwise, route the data to the error queue.

FROM: remediation-agent
TO: ops-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Alert acknowledged: service degradation originated from a cache-layer memory leak caused by a missing eviction policy. Execute remediation in parallel: (1) restart the cache service, and (2) deploy the hotfix that adds the eviction policy. After both actions complete, verify recovery by checking service health, latency, error rate, and memory stability, then report status.

FROM: negotiation-agent
TO: supplier-agent
TYPE: propose
CONTENT: I propose a deal: deliver either Product A at $100/unit or Product B at $85/unit. For whichever product is selected, delivery must proceed in sequence: first confirm inventory; then ship to the warehouse and send the invoice simultaneously; then await payment confirmation. The pricing is justified by current market rates.

(request
  :sender data-processing-agent
  :receiver worker-agent
  :content "(sequence
    (action worker-agent (download-dataset :source data-lake :output raw-dataset))
    (action worker-agent (clean-dataset :input raw-dataset :operation remove-null-rows :output cleaned-dataset))
    (action worker-agent (upload-dataset :input cleaned-dataset :destination warehouse)))"
  :reply-with msg-001
  :language SL
  :ontology data-processing
)

  :sender deployment-agent

  :reply-with msg-001

)

  :sender orchestrator-agent
  :receiver pipeline-agent
  :content "((sequence
               (validate-input-schema input-data)
               (parallel
                 (run-sentiment-analysis validated-data)
                 (run-topic-classification validated-data))
               (merge-results sentiment-result topic-result single-report)))"
  :reply-with msg-001
  :language SL
  :ontology nlp-pipeline
)

(request
  :sender query-agent
  :receiver data-agent
  :content "((action data-agent (if (cache-available query-key) (fetch-from-cache query-key) (sequence (query-database query-key) (update-cache query-key results)))))"
  :reply-with msg-001
  :language SL
  :ontology data-retrieval
)

(request
  :sender security-agent
  :receiver audit-agent
  :content "((and (parallel (scan-open-ports :scope all-services) (check-ssl-certificates :scope all-services)) (exclude-from-scope internal-only-services)))"
  :reply-with sec-req-001
  :language SL
  :ontology security-audit
)

(request
  :sender etl-orchestrator
  :receiver pipeline-agent
  :content "((message-id etl-msg-001) (protocol-version \"FIPA-ACL-1.0\") (etl-workflow (extract (parallel (source api) (source database))) (transform (input combined-data) (operation apply-validation-rules)) (if (validation-pass) (load data-warehouse) (route error-queue))))"
  :reply-with etl-msg-001
  :in-reply-to none
  :language SL
  :ontology etl-domain
)

(request
  :sender incident-response-agent
  :receiver remediation-agent
  :content "((and (alert service-degradation) (caused-by (memory-leak cache-layer)) (root-cause (missing-eviction-policy cache-layer)) (execute (sequence (parallel (restart-service cache-service) (deploy-hotfix cache-eviction-policy)) (verify service-recovery)))))"
  :reply-with msg-001
  :in-reply-to alert-001
  :language SL
  :ontology incident-management
)

(propose
  :sender negotiation-agent
  :receiver supplier-agent
  :content "((and
    (or
      (deliver (product A) (unit-price USD-100))
      (deliver (product B) (unit-price USD-85)))
    (forall (?p)
      (implies (chosen ?p)
        (sequence
          (confirm-inventory ?p)
          (parallel
            (ship-to-warehouse ?p)
            (send-invoice ?p))
          (await-payment-confirmation ?p))))
    (justified-by (pricing current-market-rates))))"
  :reply-with deal-proposal-001
  :in-reply-to none
  :language SL
  :ontology supply-chain-negotiation
)

From: Data-Processing Agent  
To: Worker Agent  
Message: Please execute these steps in order: first, download the dataset from the data lake; second, clean it by removing all rows with null values; third, upload the cleaned dataset to the warehouse.

From: Deployment Agent  
To: Cluster Manager  
Message: Please run these three health checks simultaneously: check CPU usage, check memory usage, and check disk space, then report the results.
From: Routing Agent | To: Handler Agent | Message: Please process the incoming request through the primary API endpoint if it is available; otherwise, route it to the fallback cache service.

From: Orchestrator Agent  
To: Pipeline Agent  
Message: Please validate the input schema first. If validation succeeds, run sentiment analysis and topic classification concurrently on the validated data, then merge both outputs into a single consolidated report and return it to me.

From: Query Agent  
To: Data Agent  
Message: Please check the cache first for this request. If cached results are available, return them immediately. If not, query the database, return the fresh results, and then update the cache with those results.

From: Security Agent  
To: Audit Agent  
Message: Please run open-port scanning and SSL certificate checks in parallel for all in-scope external services, and exclude any internal-only services from the scan scope.

Message-ID: MSG-ETL-20260301-0001
Protocol-Version: MAS-1.0
From: ETL-Orchestrator-Agent
To: ETL-Pipeline-Agent
Message: Please execute the ETL flow as follows: extract data from API-Source-Agent and Database-Source-Agent simultaneously, combine and transform the data by applying validation rules, then load into Data-Warehouse-Agent if validation passes, or route the records and validation errors to Error-Queue-Agent if validation fails.

From: Incident Response Agent  
To: Cache Operations Agent, Deployment Agent, Monitoring Agent  
Message: Monitoring alert acknowledged. Root cause is a cache-layer memory leak from a missing eviction policy. Execute these actions in parallel now: Cache Operations Agent, restart the cache service; Deployment Agent, deploy the hotfix that adds the eviction policy. Monitoring Agent, once both actions complete, verify service recovery by confirming cache memory stabilizes and latency/error rates return to baseline, then report recovery status immediately.

From: Negotiation Agent  
To: Supplier  
Message: I propose the following terms: deliver either Product A at $100/unit or Product B at $85/unit, based on your choice. These prices are justified by current market rates. For the selected product, please follow this sequence exactly: first confirm inventory; second, ship to the warehouse and send the invoice simultaneously; third, await payment confirmation.

FROM: data-processing-agent
TO: worker-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Please perform these steps in order: 1) Download the dataset from the data lake. 2) Remove all rows containing null values to clean the dataset. 3) Upload the cleaned dataset to the warehouse.

FROM: deployment-agent
TO: cluster-manager
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Please run these three health checks simultaneously: check CPU usage, check memory usage, and check disk space.

FROM: routing-agent
TO: handler-agent
TYPE: inform
CONTENT: Process the incoming request using the primary API endpoint when available; otherwise use the fallback cache service.

FROM: orchestrator
TO: pipeline-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: First validate the input schema. If validation succeeds, run sentiment analysis and topic classification simultaneously on the validated data, then merge both outputs into a single report and return it. If validation fails, return a validation error and stop.

FROM: query-agent
TO: data-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Retrieve the requested results from cache if available; otherwise query the database, return the fresh results, and update the cache with those results.

FROM: security-agent
TO: audit-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Execute open-port scanning and SSL certificate validation simultaneously for all in-scope external services, explicitly excluding all internal-only services from the scan scope.

FROM: etl-orchestrator  
TO: etl-pipeline  
TYPE: request  
CONTENT: Message-ID: ETL-20260301-0001; Protocol-Version: 1.0; Execute workflow: start parallel extraction from API source and database source, merge extracted datasets, apply validation rules to merged data, then if validation passes load into the data warehouse, otherwise route failed data to the error queue.

FROM: incident-commander
TO: ops-agent
TYPE: request
CONTENT: Execute concurrent remediation for the alert: restart the cache service and deploy a hotfix that adds the missing eviction policy. After both actions complete, verify service recovery by confirming healthy status checks, stabilized cache memory usage, and normalized latency/error metrics, then report final status.

FROM: negotiation-agent
TO: supplier-agent
TYPE: propose
CONTENT: We propose delivery of either Product A at $100/unit or Product B at $85/unit, justified by current market rates. For the chosen product, process in this sequence: first confirm inventory; second ship to warehouse and send invoice simultaneously; third await payment confirmation.

  workflow-step-1: confirm inventory
  workflow-step-2: ship to warehouse and send invoice simultaneously
  workflow-step-3: await payment confirmation
  pricing-justification: pricing is based on current market rates

[id:"m-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"pipeline-run-01", ^:4]
CMD(@orchestrator>@pipeline-agent): validate_schema($input) -> (sentiment_analysis($validated) & topic_classification($validated)) -> merge_results($sentiment, $topics) -> report($report)

[id:"m-cache-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"ctx-query-data", ^:4]
CMD(@query-agent>@data-agent): cache_get($query) -> deliver($rows) | (db_query($query) -> cache_set($query,$rows) -> deliver($rows))

[id:"m-sec-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"sec-audit-20260301", ^:4]
CMD(@security-agent>@audit-agent): scan_open_ports(#scope{exclude:[#internal_only_services]}) & check_ssl_certificates(#scope{exclude:[#internal_only_services]})

[id:"msg-etl-001", %%:1]
CMD(@etl-orchestrator>@pipeline): extract("api-source") & extract("database-source") -> combine() -> apply_validation_rules() -> (validation_passed()=T -> load("data-warehouse") | validation_passed()=F -> route("error-queue"))

[id:"m-incident-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"ctx-cache-incident-001", ^:5]
PUB(@monitoring-agent>@orchestrator-agent): #alert{id:"a-cache-001", severity:#critical, service:@api-service, layer:@cache-layer, incident:(#service_degradation <- #memory_leak <- #missing_eviction_policy), remediation:(restart(@cache-service) & deploy(@cache-hotfix) -> verify(status(@api-service)=#recovered))}

[id:"m-001", %%:1, ts:1772323200, ctx:"negotiation-ctx-1", ^:3]
PRO(@negotiation-agent>@supplier): #deal{options:[#offer{product:"A", price:100usd, unit:"unit"}, #offer{product:"B", price:85usd, unit:"unit"}], execution:select($product) -> confirm_inventory($product) -> (ship_to("warehouse",$product) & send_invoice($product)) -> await(payment_confirmation()), rationale:"current market rates"}
